payload.businessDescription: Hi! I am starting a new business in Bern, Switzerland. It is a listening bar called Schallplatte. People come to listen to vinyl records on high-end audio equipment while drinking craft cocktails. We do not have any photos yet - the space is still being built out. The concept is inspired by Japanese kissaten coffee shops but for music. Very intimate, maybe 20 seats max. Opening in 3 months.
